query:
INSERT INTO communications (channel, direction, fromAddress, toAddress, subject, body, status, tenantId, propertyId) VALUES
('email', 'outbound', 'property@example.com', 'tenant1@example.com', 'Rent Arrears Notice - 123 Sample St', 'Dear Tenant,

This is to inform you that your rent payment is currently 12 days overdue. Please arrange payment immediately to avoid further action.

Amount Due: $2,400
Due Date: January 25, 2026

Please contact us if you need to discuss payment arrangements.

Regards,
Property Management', 'pending_approval', 1, 1),
('email', 'outbound', 'property@example.com', 'tenant2@example.com', 'Maintenance Update - Plumbing Repair', 'Dear Tenant,

We have approved the plumbing repair at your property. A contractor will be in touch within 24 hours to schedule the work.

Estimated Cost: $350
Expected Completion: Within 3 business days

Please ensure access to the property during business hours.

Regards,
Property Management', 'pending_approval', NULL, 1),
('sms', 'outbound', '+64211234567', '+64212345678', NULL, 'Hi, your viewing for 123 Sample St is confirmed for tomorrow at 2pm. Please arrive on time. Reply CANCEL to cancel.', 'pending_approval', NULL, 1);
